acquisition method: The inline Orbitrap Lumos was operated at 2.3 kV in data-dependent mode
alkylation reagent: 15 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: 15 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
cleavage agent: 0.66 µg Trypsin Platinum (Promega, Madison, WI) overnight
collision energy: Stepped HCD fragmentation of 34, 38 and 42% collision energy was used
enrichment method: each recombinant actin was purified by affinity chromatography
fragmentation method: Stepped HCD fragmentation of 34, 38 and 42% collision energy was used
instrument: The inline Orbitrap Lumos was operated at 2.3 kV
labeling: Samples were dissolved in 65 µl 2% ACN and 0.5% formic acid in water, then 0.5 µg was injected onto a pulled tip nano-LC column
reduction reagent: Samples (15–30 µg) were treated with 5 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine (TCEP)
reduction concentration: Samples (15–30 µg) were treated with 5 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine (TCEP)
